personal.name: Kshitij Bajpai
personal.title: Software Engineer | Backend Systems Engineer
personal.tagline: Building scalable payment systems, distributed architectures, and production-grade backend ecosystems.

timeline.title: Software Developer Engineer - II
description: Maintained post-disbursement payment systems powering UPI, eNACH mandates, repayments, and lending workflows.
Resolved distributed production issues across payment microservices, improving reliability and reducing transaction failures.
Built secure JWT-authenticated REST APIs for internal workflows and inter-service communication.
Engineered internal admin dashboards for audit automation, compliance readiness, and operational observability.

timeline.title: Software Developer
description: Built backend systems automating lane creation, vendor bidding, and freight workflow optimization.
Designed asynchronous logistics workflows improving throughput and reducing manual operational effort.
Optimized SQL and aggregation systems for speed, compliance, and resilience.
Developed scalable logistics interfaces improving processing speed and operational control.

timeline.title: Software Developer
description: Built scalable payment gateway integrations across multiple providers.
Improved backend performance through optimized data workflows and scalable API systems.
Developed scheduling, communications, and automation infrastructure.
Implemented secure production APIs and dynamic document generation systems.

timeline.title: Senior System Engineer
description: Designed Kafka streaming systems processing 14–15 million messages per hour.
Improved real-time query performance across analytical systems.
Optimized enterprise network throughput and protocol performance.
Contributed to internal automation and enterprise-grade deployment workflows.

timeline.title: B.Tech - Computer Science & Engineering
description: Graduated with 8.02 GPA.
Built foundations in software engineering, object-oriented programming, algorithms, and backend systems.
Focused deeply on technical growth and scalable systems thinking.

timeline.title: Senior Secondary Schooling
description: Achieved 89% academic performance.
Strengthened analytical and scientific foundations.

timeline.title: Secondary Schooling
description: Achieved 10 CGPA.
Established strong academic discipline and foundational growth.

projects.title: Distributed Payment Reliability Systems
projects.description: Built and maintained secure post-disbursement payment infrastructure handling mandates, repayments, and audit workflows.

projects.title: Kafka-Driven Logistics Automation
